query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of multiple yellow dome-shaped pendant light fixtures photographed from directly below, showing curved outer surfaces and bright circular openings where light emits, filling the frame with rounded yellow geometric forms.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up view of multiple yellow dome-shaped pendant light fixtures photographed from directly below, exhibiting exposure extremes that completely blow out the light sources into pure white voids and wash over adjacent surfaces, reducing the fixtures to curved geometric forms dominated by bright yellow and white fields.
